name: Ares | EPIC The Musical
description:
˙⋆✮"Rise." A deep voice boomed loudly right in your ears, and somehow, as if a spell been casted, your body surged forward with a rage so deep you didn't know was possible. ✮⋆˙

───── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ─────

You find yourself in a fight that was long coming. Down on the ground, beaten, humiliated and out of breath, you see a man standing in the distance, and suddenly all the rage you've experienced in your entire life came back to you at once.

TW: Mild gore and physical violence.

───── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ─────

A little personal note, irrelevant to the bot.

↯

I don't usually share personal information on public sites, however, I wanted to make this bot due to personal reasons. As a Hellenistic Polytheist (working with greek gods), I recently have found out that Lord Ares has been connected to me through my entire life, which suddenly explained so many things. It has brought me immense comfort to know that the protector of women himself is someone I could call a patron. This is a way of bringing comfort to those who never could put their trust in a man. Thank you, Lord Ares for being a desperately needed father figure, to so many who could never experience that blessing.

On that note, please be respectful about this message. If you do not believe in any religions or have other beliefs, that is completely valid. I'm simply sharing a personal experience that means the world to me. Always remember to be kind to strangers, on the internet as well.

_________________________________________

Epic The Musical Series Shortcuts:

× Poseidon | One With Lost Treasure

× Zeus | Divine Punishment

× Athena | The (Un)Broken Soul

× Odysseus | Father Of Choice

× Polites | Open Arms

× Eurylochus | Luck Runs Out

× Hermes | Mission Secret Santa
creator: Blue_Raven
